title: vendor containers/storage@v1.31.3
body:
* store: ReloadIfChanged propagates errors from Modified()
* store: load additional image stores once
* store: fix graphLock reload

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL ... that's vendoring the backports to fix the flake of doom from last week.
